🚨 FREEZER CLEAN OUT SALE – THIS WEEKEND ONLY! 🚨

🔔YOU GUYS ARE AMAZING! TRULY! 
We are sold out of freezer thighs and whole legs! We do have 2 orders of drumsticks left! 
We do have fresh whole legs available if interested! 

Help us make room for the next batch!
🥩 10 lbs MIX & MATCH, you choose the cuts! 
• Thighs
• Drumsticks
• Whole legs
💥 ONLY $25 💥

The first 10 orders gets a special added surprise from us! 

Perfect for grilling, meal prep, or stocking up!
📩 Message us to claim yours before they’re gone — limited availability!

🐷✨ Piglet Time on the Farm! ✨🐷
The wait is over… our piglets have arrived and we are already obsessed! These little ones are full of personality, zoomies, and the cutest snorts you’ve ever heard.
From wobbly first steps to curious little noses exploring everything, there’s never a dull moment around here right now. 💕
Stay tuned for more photos and updates as they grow — trust us, you won’t want to miss it!
#PigletTime #FarmLife #RoswellFamilyFarm #BabyAnimals #SpringOnTheFarm

Don’t forget, EGG DEAL TODAY! 
Until sold out! 🙂

Thank you so much for supporting our local farm 🌾
